name: openmark-router
description: Benchmark-driven model routing powered by OpenMark AI. Routes tasks to optimal models using real evaluation data — accuracy, cost, latency, stability — not keyword heuristics or complexity tiers. Fully deterministic execution: LLM only classifies tasks, scripts handle all control flow (model switching, fallback setup, provider detection, routing card generation, auto-restore). Supports direct API providers and OpenRouter. Features auto and manual routing modes, provider auto-discovery, intelligent classification (only when needed — no overhead on greetings or follow-ups), 5 routing strategies, benchmark-ranked fallback models for rate limit resilience. Security-first: never accesses API keys or system files. Clean install with zero external dependencies.
author: openmarkai
